    title: "Baryonic Feedback in Cosmological Simulations"

## Summary
AGN and stellar feedback suppresses the matter power spectrum on scales k > 0.5 h/Mpc by 5–20%, biasing cosmological parameter inference from weak lensing.

## Evidence
BAHAMAS, IllustrisTNG, and FLAMINGO simulations agree on the direction but disagree on magnitude by factors of 2–3.

## Significance
Leading systematic uncertainty for Stage-IV surveys; failure to model correctly could bias dark energy constraints by several sigma.
